title: MineTopia Mod
description: MineTopia Mod is a decoration mod with some extra features such as: Items, hats, clothes, dolls, tools and even food. This mod gives more realism to the game.
body:
**MineTopia Mod is a decoration mod with some extra features such as: Items, hats, clothes, dolls, tools and even food. This mod gives more realism to the game.**

 

*This mod is now being rebuilt from scratch. I do this because I wasn't happy with some things in the mod. As a result, it may take a while for a release of a new version. The new update will be in minecraft 1.20.1 for now.*


## Features
- Items
- Hats
- Blocks
- Food
- Dolls
- Clothes
- Custom commands
 

## This may help you
If there are any bugs/issues go to the issue page and report it, I will try my best to solve it.
Make sure you have cheats enabled.

The minecraft 1.16 version is still missing some recipes. Mostly for the food items. For now this is not beign worked on

[Issue page](https://github.com/GhostgamesDHG/MineTopiaMod-1.20.X/issues)
